name: daisy-pod
description: Local-first native iOS podcast app with a DaisyPod backend.

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run ios:build
scripts.test: npm --workspace @daisy-pod/server run test && npm run ios:test
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @daisy-pod/server run typecheck && npm run ios:build
scripts.ios:build: cd apps/ios && xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project DaisyPod.xcodeproj -scheme DaisyPod -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 13 mini' build
scripts.ios:test: cd apps/ios && xcodegen generate && xcodebuild test -project DaisyPod.xcodeproj -scheme DaisyPod -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 13 mini'
